summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Linked Consultants feature (Iteration 5). All 10 backend API tests passed (100%). All UI tests passed - verified Add User modal shows linked consultants section for Assistant role, Edit User modal shows linked consultants section for assistant users, user list shows 'Linked to: [names]' badges for assistants, and commission endpoint correctly returns deals.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended (same as previous iterations)

critical_code_review_comments: Add User modal correctly shows 'LINK TO CONSULTANTS / MANAGERS' section when Assistant role is selected
Edit User modal correctly shows linked consultants section for assistant users with pre-populated checkboxes
User list shows 'Linked to: [consultant names]' lime-colored badges for assistant users
POST /api/auth/register correctly saves linked_consultants array for assistant users
GET /api/leads filters leads by linked_consultants for assistant users
GET /api/appointments filters appointments for linked consultant's leads
Assistant can update leads owned by linked consultants (PUT /api/leads/{id})
Assistant can create appointments for linked consultant's leads (POST /api/appointments)
GET /api/commission?user_id={consultant_id} returns deals in cash_deals and debit_deals arrays
Deals created via POST /api/deals appear in commission sheet correctly
seed_data_creation: Test assistant users created during testing were deactivated after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Linked consultants feature fully functional. Key features tested: (1) Add User modal shows linked consultants checkboxes when Assistant role selected, (2) Edit User modal shows linked consultants section for assistants, (3) User list shows lime-colored 'Linked to: [names]' badges for assistants, (4) Assistant users can only see leads/appointments owned by their linked consultants, (5) Assistants can update leads and create appointments for linked consultant's leads, (6) Commission endpoint returns deals correctly with cash_deals and debit_deals arrays.

features_verified.add_user_linked_consultants_section: PASS - Section appears when Assistant role is selected
features_verified.add_user_consultant_checkboxes: PASS - Shows checkboxes for all active consultants/managers
features_verified.edit_user_linked_consultants_section: PASS - Section appears for assistant users
features_verified.edit_user_pre_populated_checkboxes: PASS - Checkboxes are pre-populated with linked consultants
features_verified.user_list_linked_badges: PASS - Shows 'Linked to: [names]' lime badges for assistants
features_verified.api_leads_filter_for_assistant: PASS - GET /api/leads filters by linked_consultants for assistants
features_verified.api_appointments_filter_for_assistant: PASS - GET /api/appointments filters for linked consultant's leads
features_verified.api_assistant_update_leads: PASS - PUT /api/leads/{id} works for assistant on linked consultant's leads
features_verified.api_assistant_create_appointments: PASS - POST /api/appointments works for assistant on linked consultant's leads
features_verified.api_commission_returns_deals: PASS - GET /api/commission returns cash_deals and debit_deals arrays
features_verified.api_deal_appears_in_commission: PASS - Created deals appear in commission sheet
